title: map-controls-generated.json
description: Authoritative shape for map-generate-controls skill output. Produced by skills/map-generate-controls. Consumed by scripts/map-assemble.py and validate_state.py:check_controls_generated. Enforces the CTRL-<SCOPE>-<CAT>-NNN ID pattern locked in iter-14 Class C. additionalProperties:false at top level and inside controls[] to catch schema drift; permissive inside _metadata sidecars for operator-defined documentation fields.

phase.description: Optional top-level marker. Validator CHECK-S11 does not require it today, but when present it must be the canonical phase name.

coverage_gaps.description: Optional — Rule C1 feasibility filter gaps. Forwarded by map-assemble into mapping-results.coverage_gaps.posture_gap[].

classification_fallback_log.description: Optional — iter-12 F11 classifier emits fallback entries when no verb/noun-phrase/title match fires. Each entry is {mitigation_id, reason}.

mitigation_coverage.description: Optional — summary stats on how many input mitigations ended up with at least one control.

assessment_gap_coverage.description: Optional — summary stats on how many assessment_gaps from Phase 0 ended up addressed by a control.

stats.description: Optional — generator-emitted counters (posture distribution, mechanism distribution, etc.).

id.description: Canonical control-ID format (iter-14 Class C). Literal CTRL- prefix; service identity lives in _metadata.service and validated.service, NOT in the ID.

posture.description: Phase C Rule C1 posture classification. Should be present on every control generated after iter-11 Phase C (commit b9e9545). Not in the required list to avoid breaking pre-Phase-C archives, but validator CHECK-15 cross-checks it against the artifact's directory family when present.

source.description: Phase C Rule C1 source tag: sar = SAR condition keys drive the mechanism; api = botocore parameters drive it; both = tag-based controls usable via either path.

actions.description: IAM actions the control gates, e.g. 'dynamodb:CreateTable'.

condition_keys.description: Service-specific or global condition keys referenced by the control's enforcement logic.

parameters_controlled.description: Botocore parameter paths (JSONPath rooted at request body).

framework_objectives.description: Populated by scripts/map-assemble.py::build_reverse_index after map-framework-mapping runs. Absent in map-generate-controls output.

assessment_gap_ids.description: Optional — iter-13 addition linking the control back to GAP-NN entries from assessment-summary.md.

attack_techniques.description: Optional — MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs (e.g. T1078) the control addresses. iter-13 addition when a threat model is provided.
